title: Lebanon Ceasefire Collapsed in Hours — UN Peacekeeper Killed
script: Israel and Lebanon announced a ceasefire today. Within hours, Israeli forces launched fresh strikes across southern Lebanon. A UN peacekeeper from Serbia was killed — struck by a mortar at his post near Marjayoun. Two others were wounded. The deal requires Hezbollah to stop firing and withdraw all fighters from the border zone. Hezbollah has not agreed. The Israeli military says it is still targeting Hezbollah infrastructure in southern Lebanon. The ceasefire exists on paper only.
